task_updates.executor_notes: Removed the raw client `createTask({ task_type, params })` path, made the request type family-only, inlined the remaining optional-field helpers that depended on the deleted pipeline utility, and deleted the obsolete client request-composition pipeline modules/tests. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed after the deletions and client API rewrite.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Not yet verified against staging DB rows. The upscale/videoEnhance resolver ports compile cleanly, but the required deploy/UI/DB comparison could not be completed because the staging deploy command never completed in this workspace.

After removing the raw client request path, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, the deleted pipeline modules are no longer imported anywhere in `src`, and `createTask(...)` call sites now route through the family-based request shape rather than `{ task_type, params }`.
